title: Boba Client
description: Boba Client is an all in one pvp client dedicated to making your experience feel better when playing the game. Everything is all hypixel compliant.
body:
Boba Client is a 100% free pvp client designed to help enhance your gameplay on a visual perspective when playing on hypixel. It also features built in mods like AutoGG, AutoTip and a ton of other hypixel compliant mods!

# NOTICE
This client is NOT entirely compliant with optifine. It may cause some rendering issues and overall problems i see no point in using optifine if you're using it for the zoom mechanic just use the built in one.

# Features
- Toggle Sprint
- Auto Tip
- Boba Highlighter 
- TNT Timer
- Item Physics
- Dynamic Capes
- Chat Stacker
- Better Rendering (Experimental)
- Zoom
- Auto GG
- Capes!
